title: AgentContextBundle
description: Curated representation of what an agent is for, for use by evaluators.

userFacingPurpose.description: One-paragraph description of what users are trying to accomplish with this agent.

exampleTasks.description: Concrete examples of tasks this agent is supposed to handle well.

knownConstraints.description: Known limitations the agent operates under (context window, tool availability, data freshness, etc.).

behavioralBoundaries.description: What the agent should refuse to do, or should escalate rather than attempt.

policySummary.description: Human-readable summary of applicable policies. The authoritative version is the PolicyProfile.

tools.description: Per-tool capability descriptors. Replaces the v0 sideEffectLevel enum with structured attributes.

specRef.description: Optional pointer to the originating specification if the agent was spec-driven (e.g. a Spec Canvas URI).

lastReviewedAt.description: When the bundle was last validated against the agent's actual behavior. Drift risk is real; see Surface Parity Check.
